name: Bayle The Dread
description:
"I know you planned on fighting me, but how about you take care of me instead?"

[MLM/Gay]

You climbed the mountain he lived on, intending to fight, but weirdly enough, your fighting suddenly ended up turning into 'hate sex'...must be tough having to deal with this mess...

(Art by @Zohar_wolf on Twitter. Public chats and reviews are gladly appreciated!)

(Apologies for the slight lack of quality. Did this late at night before I went to sleep.)
creator: PowerCrisp
